name: morning-scan
description: Complete morning market scan with parallel subagent execution
task: Execute comprehensive morning market scan. Spawn three parallel subagents: (1) Scanner - fetch prices, funding rates, liquidations from Coinbase; (2) Analyst - technical analysis, pattern detection, support/resistance levels; (3) Risk-check - portfolio heat, correlation analysis, position sizing validation. Merge outputs into unified WATCHLIST.md update. Alert on high-conviction setups meeting all pre-trade criteria. Reference SOUL.md discipline framework and trader-config.json risk limits.
